SQLLoaderMapping.name: Species types
SQLLoaderMapping.fetch_sql:
SELECT
                s_tr.name AS SpeciesTypeName,
                f_tr.name AS ForestTypeName,
                CASE
                    WHEN g.id IN (
                        SELECT g.id
                        FROM genus g
                        INNER JOIN genus_tr g_tr_en
                            ON g.id = g_tr_en.genus_id
                        WHERE g_tr_en.locale_id = 1
                            AND g_tr_en.name IN ('Missing Value', 'Not applicable')
                    )
                        THEN CASE
                            WHEN f.id IN (
                                SELECT f.id
                                FROM forest_type f
                                INNER JOIN forest_type_tr f_tr_en
                                    ON f.id = f_tr_en.forest_type_id
                                WHERE f_tr_en.locale_id = 1
                                    AND f_tr_en.name IN ('Mixedwood', 'Hardwood')
                            )
                                THEN (
                                    SELECT g_tr_localized.name
                                    FROM genus g
                                    INNER JOIN genus_tr g_tr_en
                                        ON g_tr_en.locale_id = 1
                                        AND g.id = g_tr.genus_id
                                    INNER JOIN genus_tr g_tr_localized
                                        ON g.id = g_tr_localized.genus_id
                                    INNER JOIN locale
                                        ON g_tr_localized.locale_id = locale.id
                                    WHERE locale.code = 'en-CA'
                                        AND g_tr_en.name = 'Unspecified broad-leaved species'
                                )
                            ELSE (
                                SELECT g_tr_localized.name
                                FROM genus g
                                INNER JOIN genus_tr g_tr_en
                                    ON g_tr_en.locale_id = 1
                                    AND g.id = g_tr.genus_id
                                INNER JOIN genus_tr g_tr_localized
                                    ON g.id = g_tr_localized.genus_id
                                INNER JOIN locale
                                    ON g_tr_localized.locale_id = locale.id
                                WHERE locale.code = 'en-CA'
                                    AND g_tr_en.name = 'Unspecified conifirs'
                            )
                        END
                    ELSE g_tr.name
                END AS GenusName
            FROM species s
            INNER JOIN species_tr s_tr
                ON s.id = s_tr.species_id
            INNER JOIN forest_type f
                ON s.forest_type_id = f.id
            INNER JOIN forest_type_tr f_tr
                ON f.id = f_tr.forest_type_id
            INNER JOIN genus g
                ON s.genus_id = g.id
            INNER JOIN genus_tr g_tr
                ON g.id = g_tr.genus_id
            INNER JOIN locale
                ON s_tr.locale_id = locale.id
                AND f_tr.locale_id = locale.id
                AND g_tr.locale_id = locale.id
            WHERE locale.code = 'en-CA'
SQLLoaderMapping.load_sql:
INSERT INTO species (
                forest_type_id,
                genus_id,
                name)
            SELECT
                f.id,
                g.id,
                @SpeciesTypeName AS name
            FROM forest_type f, genus g
            WHERE f.name = @ForestTypeName
                AND g.name = @GenusName
